failure_signature: Frontend skill instructions degraded in long coding session — agent forgot to apply responsive design and accessibility requirements mid-project

environment.context_note: 40+ turn conversation, multiple components being built

user_correction: User re-invoked the skill to refresh requirements
remedy: Frontend skill should be invoked in focused sub-sessions per component rather than one long session. Keep SKILL.md concise with a checklist of non-negotiable requirements.
